overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage following a cloaked character walking through ancient stone ruins at sunset. The character traverses a narrow cobblestone corridor between weathered rock walls before turning into an open landscape revealing distant mountains and a gothic castle.

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a narrow ancient stone corridor flanked by high rock walls. The cobblestone path stretches toward a solitary pine tree silhouetted against a dramatic golden-hour sky. Around the 45-second mark, the ground becomes wet and reflective as the path begins to widen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant castle and mountain views

events.description: character turns sharply to the right to exit the stone corridor
exiting the enclosed corridor into open landscape revealing castle and mountains

agents.ego_description: turning right to exit the corridor and enter the open landscape, revealing the castle

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence lining the edge of the path
gothic-style stone castle with spires visible in the distance
grassy area surrounding the path as the corridor opens up

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to exit the stone corridor, revealing an open landscape with a wooden fence, grassy fields, and a distant gothic castle against the mountain backdrop. The high rock walls fall away as the scene opens up, transitioning from the enclosed passage to the expansive outdoor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic stone passage into a vast, open mountain landscape at sunset. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow ancient corridor flanked by high rock walls, moving along a cobblestone path toward a solitary pine tree silhouetted against a golden sky. As the character advances, the ground becomes wet and reflective while the corridor gradually begins to widen. The scene then opens up as the character turns right, causing the oppressive rock walls to fall away and reveal an expansive vista of grassy fields and a wooden fence. This movement finally culminates in a wide view of a distant gothic castle set against a dramatic backdrop of mountains.
